title: A conditionally executed single line should be denoted by indentation
description: A conditionally executed single line should be denoted by indentation. Analyze your code consistency-formatted maintainability Code Smell confusing suspicious Why is this an issue? When the line immediately after conditional statements has neither curly braces nor indentation, the intent of the code is unclear and perhaps not executed as expected. Additionally, such code is confusing to maintainers. The rule will check the line indentation after the following conditional statements: if and if-else statements, for statement, foreach statement, do statement, while statement
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: A conditionally executed single line should be denoted by indentation.
